CustomField.formula:
IF( TECH_TypePDL__c = "PDE_Gaz", (AbonnementMois__c * 12) + (PrixMolecule__c * CARGaz__c) + (FraisTransportDistributionCapacite__c * CARGaz__c) + (CeeMwh__c * CARGaz__c),
IF( TECH_Segment__c = "C5" && CONTAINS(TECH_FTA__c, "4 postes"), (AbonnementMois__c * 12) + (PrixHphMwh__c * Conso_HPH__c) + (PrixHchMwh__c * Conso_HCH__c) + (PrixHpeMwh__c * Conso_HPE__c) + (PrixHceMwh__c * Conso_HCE__c) + (Capa_HPH__c * Conso_HPH__c) + (Capa_HCH__c * Conso_HCH__c) + (Capa_HPE__c * Conso_HPE__c) + (Capa_HCE__c * Conso_HCE__c) + (CeeMwh__c * CAR_New__c),
IF( TECH_Segment__c = "C5" && (TECH_FTA__c = "BT <= 36 kVA - CU" || TECH_FTA__c = "BT <= 36 kVA - LU EP"), (AbonnementMois__c * 12) + (PrixBase__c * Conso_Base__c) + (Capa_Base__c * Conso_Base__c) + (CeeMwh__c * Conso_Base__c),
IF( TECH_Segment__c = "C5" && TECH_FTA__c = "BT <= 36 kVA - MU", (AbonnementMois__c * 12) + (PrixHP__c * ConsoHP__c) + (PrixHC__c * ConsoHC__c) + (Capa_HP__c * ConsoHP__c) + (Capa_HC__c * ConsoHC__c) + (CeeMwh__c * CAR_New__c),
(AbonnementMois__c * 12) + (PointesMWh__c * Conso_Pointe__c) + (PrixHphMwh__c * Conso_HPH__c) + (PrixHchMwh__c * Conso_HCH__c) + (PrixHpeMwh__c * Conso_HPE__c) + (PrixHceMwh__c * Conso_HCE__c) + (Capa_Pointes__c * Conso_Pointe__c) + (Capa_HPH__c * Conso_HPH__c) + (Capa_HCH__c * Conso_HCH__c) + (Capa_HPE__c * Conso_HPE__c) + (Capa_HCE__c * Conso_HCE__c) + (CeeMwh__c * CAR_New__c) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Budget Energie €/an
